word: G851 - ἀφαιρέω - aphairéō - af-ahee-reh'-o - Cut off

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀφαιρέω

- Transliteration: Aphaireo

- Phonetic: af-ahee-reh'-o

- Definition:

1. to take from, take away, remove, carry off

2. to cut off

- Origin: from G575 and G138

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G575 and G138; to remove (literally or figuratively): - cut (smite) off take away.
